Container.Name: AppFlowy-GoTrue
Container.Overview: GoTrue authentication service for AppFlowy Cloud — handles user sign-up, login, JWT issuance, OAuth, email magic links, and SAML. Deploy fourth (after Postgres). Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Description:
GoTrue (Supabase Auth) — the authentication and identity service for AppFlowy Cloud. Manages user registration, JWT token issuance, OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, Discord), email confirmation, and SAML 2.0.

Required: Set Base URL, Admin Email/Password, and JWT Secret. The JWT Secret must be identical in AppFlowy-Cloud and all services that verify tokens.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public-facing GoTrue URL. Set to http://YOUR_SERVER_IP/gotrue (or your domain with /gotrue). Must be reachable by clients for OAuth redirects.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Email address of the initial admin account created on first start.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the initial admin account.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Shared JWT signing secret. MUST be identical to APPFLOWY_GOTRUE_JWT_SECRET in AppFlowy-Cloud. Minimum 32 characters. Keep private.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: GoTrue PostgreSQL connection string. Update user, password, and host if you changed them. Uses the auth schema.

Config.Name: JWT Expiry (seconds)
Config.Description: JWT token lifetime in seconds. Default: 604800 (7 days).

Config.Name: Auto-confirm Email
Config.Description: Set true to skip email confirmation (recommended for initial setup). Set false to require email confirmation — you must also configure SMTP.

Config.Name: Disable Public Signup
Config.Description: Set true to allow only invited users to sign up.

Config.Name: Rate Limit (emails/min)
Config.Description: Maximum emails GoTrue can send per minute.

Config.Name: DB Driver
Config.Description: Database driver — always postgres.

Config.Name: Site URL
Config.Description: Deep-link scheme for the AppFlowy native app.

Config.Name: URI Allow List
Config.Description: Allowed OAuth redirect URIs. ** permits all; restrict for production.

Config.Name: JWT Admin Group
Config.Description: JWT group name for admin users.

Config.Name: Internal Port
Config.Description: GoTrue internal listen port. Do not change.

Config.Name: Mailer Confirm Path
Config.Description: URL path for email confirmation links.

Config.Name: Mailer Invite Path
Config.Description: URL path for invite links.

Config.Name: Mailer Recovery Path
Config.Description: URL path for password recovery links.

Config.Name: Mailer Email-Change Path
Config.Description: URL path for email-change confirmation links.

Config.Name: SMTP Host
Config.Description: SMTP server hostname (e.g. smtp.gmail.com). Required if GOTRUE_MAILER_AUTOCONFIRM=false.

Config.Name: SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP port. Use 465 for TLS/SMTPS, 587 for STARTTLS.

Config.Name: SMTP User
Config.Description: SMTP sender email address.

Config.Name: SMTP Password
Config.Description: SMTP password.

Config.Name: SMTP Admin Email
Config.Description: Admin email used as the From address.

Config.Name: SMTP Max Frequency
Config.Description: Minimum interval between emails to the same address. Use 1ns for no limit.

Config.Name: Magic Link Template URL
Config.Description: Optional: public URL to a custom magic-link email HTML template.

Config.Name: Google OAuth Enabled
Config.Description: Enable Google OAuth login.

Config.Name: Google Client ID
Config.Description: Google OAuth client ID.

Config.Name: Google Client Secret
Config.Description: Google OAuth client secret.

Config.Name: Google Redirect URI
Config.Description: Google OAuth redirect URI.

Config.Name: GitHub OAuth Enabled
Config.Description: Enable GitHub OAuth login.

Config.Name: GitHub Client ID
Config.Description: GitHub OAuth app client ID.

Config.Name: GitHub Client Secret
Config.Description: GitHub OAuth app client secret.

Config.Name: GitHub Redirect URI
Config.Description: GitHub OAuth redirect URI.

Config.Name: Discord OAuth Enabled
Config.Description: Enable Discord OAuth login.

Config.Name: Discord Client ID
Config.Description: Discord OAuth application client ID.

Config.Name: Discord Client Secret
Config.Description: Discord OAuth application client secret.

Config.Name: Discord Redirect URI
Config.Description: Discord OAuth redirect URI.

Config.Name: SAML Enabled
Config.Description: Enable SAML 2.0 single sign-on.

Config.Name: SAML Private Key
Config.Description: PEM-encoded private key for SAML 2.0 signing.
